body: Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm EST. Checked our end — it's definitely on yours. Multiple users affected.
core_issue: Dashboard stopped loading for multiple users.
summary: The dashboard stopped loading for multiple users around 2pm EST. The issue is affecting multiple users, with the customer confirming they have checked their end and the problem appears to be on the ArcVault side. The team should investigate the dashboard loading issue to determine the cause and resolution.
